testsuite.name: 正常请求测试

testcase.name: 带执行上下文的响应应正确返回
POST /api/v1/decide 应返回 REJECT 决策
POST /api/v1/decide 应返回 PASS 决策
带特征的请求应正确处理

testsuite.system-out: 2026-03-29 17:22:49.109 [Test worker] INFO o.s.t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils - Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.ruleengine.controller.DecisionControllerTest$NormalRequestTests]: NormalRequestTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-29 17:22:49.116 [Test worker] INFO o.s.b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper - Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.ruleengine.RuleEngineApplication for test class com.example.ruleengine.controller.DecisionControllerTest$NormalRequestTests 2026-03-29 17:22:49.121 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Received decision request for rule: rule-004 2026-03-29 17:22:49.121 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Rule rule-004 executed in 25ms, decision: PASS 2026-03-29 17:22:49.136 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Received decision request for rule: rule-002 2026-03-29 17:22:49.137 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Rule rule-002 executed in 10ms, decision: REJECT 2026-03-29 17:22:49.143 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Received decision request for rule: rule-001 2026-03-29 17:22:49.143 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Rule rule-001 executed in 15ms, decision: PASS 2026-03-29 17:22:49.149 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Received decision request for rule: rule-003 2026-03-29 17:22:49.149 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.controller.DecisionController - Rule rule-003 executed in 20ms, decision: PASS
